# Ansari Aluminium Project Overview

> A comprehensive platform for Aluminium & UPVC fabrication services.

Ansari Aluminium is a premier fabrication enterprise specializing in high-performance Aluminium and UPVC architectural solutions. The platform serves as a digital storefront and operations hub, streamlining the customized manufacturing and installation of energy-efficient windows, doors, and glass partitions.

## Core Services
- UPVC & Aluminium Windows (Sliding, Casement, Tilt & Turn)
- Aluminium Doors & Glass Partitions
- Balcony Coverings & Safety Jali Doors
- Structural Glazing & Toughened Glass
- Profile Panels & Architectural Cladding
- Premium Hardware Supply

## Business Operations
- Product Catalog with dynamic categories
- Quotation Generation with PDF export
- Order Management with real-time tracking
- GST-compliant Billing & Invoicing
- Customer Relationship Management (CRM)
- Admin Dashboard for business insights

## Technical Stack
- Backend: Django (Python)
- Frontend: HTML5, Tailwind CSS CDN, JavaScript
- Database: PostgreSQL (Production), SQLite (Development)
- PDF Generation: html2pdf.js (client-side)
- PWA: Progressive Web App support
